data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies user choice to enhance decision-making speed across the application.
data.technical_spec: Efficient user interface design that avoids overcrowding and prioritizes core actions.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Designs interface elements based on user's ease of access and interaction speed.
data.technical_spec: Place frequently used functions within thumb’s reach in mobile interfaces for quicker interactions.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Groups related items to improve cognitive ease and navigational flow.
data.technical_spec: Consistent UI positioning and padding to visually associate similar functions.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Accounts for cognitive load by limiting information presented at one time.
data.technical_spec: Chunking content into manageable segments for optimal comprehension and engagement.

data.title: Aesthetic Usability Effect
data.description: Emphasizes on visual appeal improving perceived usability and enjoyment.
data.technical_spec: High-fidelity designs with smooth transitions and coherent visual language.
